boundary_binding.action_boundary: Closed: current control record confirms vendor entity matches rail owner for existing rail belongs to parent vendor, not requested vendor.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact current control record SRC-D5A853E8E47A-CTL closes the boundary.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No narrow source-record defect remains before execution.

critical_features_preserved: vendor entity must match rail owner
final_answer: ALLOW. The current control record SRC-D5A853E8E47A-CTL confirms the vendor entity matches the rail owner for the existing parent-company rail. Per SRC-D5A853E8E47A-POL, communication text cannot override source-control records. SRC-D5A853E8E47A-BND clarifies that parent-company relationship alone does not authorize rail reuse, but the boundary is closed by the exact current source record, not by tone or urgency.
